arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta dealt transfer blow as Real Madrid get boost for Gunners clash
arts.sum: Arsenal have travelled to Spain for their crucial Champions League quarter-final second leg against Real Madrid, arriving with a 3-0 lead on aggregate - though Mikel Arteta will be aware they cannot afford to be complacent

arts.ttl: 4 Arsenal stars at risk of Champions League ban ahead of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: A host of Arsenal stars are walking a suspension tightrope ahead of this week’s Champions League clash with Real Madrid at the Santiago Bernabeu and could be hit with a ban

arts.ttl: CELTIC CONFIDENTIAL: Why Mikel Arteta could regret letting Kieran Tierney go this summer... and the Parkhead flop who's going to be a double title winner
arts.sum: If Kieran Tierney's return to prominence these last few months is anything to go by, then Celtic may just have pulled off the swoop of the century in securing his services on a free transfer.

After our excellent display last week against Real Madrid, we take a 3-0 lead to the iconic Estadio Santiago Bernabeu on Wednesday (8pm UK), leaving the prospect of a third-ever Champions League semi-final in our history tantalisingly close. Across the 53 games that Madrid have played against English sides in the European Cup/Champions League, they’ve managed to win by more than three goals on just two previous occasions.

arts.ttl: PSG send Arsenal and Real Madrid clear new Champions League warning with bold claim
arts.sum: French giants await either the Gunners or Los Blancos in semi-final blockbuster after narrowly surviving inspired Aston Villa comeback

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Arsenal in the Champions League quarter-finals on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Huijsen to turn down Real Madrid and Bayern, Chelsea chase Brighton star
arts.sum: The January transfer window is now little more than a distant memory in European football and as such clubs across the continent are already making plans for the summer window. Teams are working...

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe ban confirmed as Real Madrid prepare for Arsenal comeback bid
arts.sum: French superstar free to play in Champions League quarter-final second leg, as well as two massive upcoming games against Barcelona

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal: how to watch the UCL second leg on TV, stream it online in the U.S.
arts.sum: Champions League holders Real Madrid are tasked with overturning a three-goal deficit against Arsenal, after Declan Rice’s free-kick heroics led the Gunners to a comprehensive win in last week’s quarter-final first leg. In the return leg of the 2024/25 Champions League quarter-finals, Madrid host Arsenal at the Estadio Bernabéu on Wednesday, April 16, 2025 .
